sizing_rule.note: Rule describes expected drawdown consequences (35-55% of time period) when trading at optimal f levels. Acts as a risk tolerance check rather than a specific sizing formula. Traders uncomfortable with this drawdown profile should use fractional optimal f instead.

source_rule_text: When trading at optimal f levels, expect to be in worst-case drawdown 35-55% of the time period, which may not be acceptable to traders with living expense needs or those preferring smoother equity curves.
